name: ShipMonk 3PL Fulfillment API
what_it_does: ShipMonk third-party logistics (3PL) fulfillment REST API for e-commerce order fulfillment, inventory management, and warehouse operations. Enables AI agents to manage order creation and fulfillment routing for e-commerce order automation, handle inventory level monitoring and reorder point management for stock replenishment automation, access inbound shipment and purchase order receiving for warehouse inbound workflow automation, retrieve shipping rate shopping and carrier selection for cost-optimized shipping automation, manage SKU and product catalog for multi-channel inventory management, handle return processing and reverse logistics for customer return automation, access tracking and delivery status for post-purchase customer communication automation, retrieve billing and fulfillment cost reporting for 3PL cost management, manage multi-warehouse and multi-channel allocation for distributed fulfillment automation, and integrate ShipMonk with Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, and Walmart for omnichannel fulfillment.
use_cases: Fulfilling e-commerce orders from order management agents
Monitoring inventory from replenishment automation agents
Processing returns from reverse logistics agents
Optimizing shipping from carrier selection agents
not_for: Enterprise manufacturing supply chain (use Manhattan Associates or Blue Yonder)
best_when: A direct-to-consumer e-commerce brand or multi-channel retailer wanting AI agents to automate order fulfillment, inventory management, inbound receiving, and return processing within ShipMonk as the 3PL fulfillment partner.
avoid_when: INVENTORY ACCURACY VS ACTUAL WAREHOUSE CYCLE COUNT: Automated inventory replenishment decisions based on ShipMonk API inventory levels may not reflect real-time warehouse cycle count discrepancies; automated purchase orders triggered on API inventory data without warehouse count reconciliation create overstock on shrink or damage; implement inventory accuracy threshold before automated reorder triggers. CARRIER SERVICE LEVEL COMMITMENT ACCURACY: Automated carrier selection via ShipMonk rate shopping must verify carrier service level agreements for the specific ship-from warehouse location; automated carrier commitments based on rate estimates without warehouse-specific carrier performance data create delivery promise inaccuracy. HAZMAT AND RESTRICTED GOODS FULFILLMENT: Automated order routing for products containing hazmat materials (batteries, aerosols, flammables) must apply carrier-specific hazmat restrictions; automated fulfillment of restricted items via non-hazmat-certified carrier creates carrier compliance violation and shipment rejection.

auth.notes: ShipMonk uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Dania Beach, Florida HQ. Founded 2014 by Jan Bednar. Private ($290M raised, 8VC, CION Investment, others). 10+ fulfillment centers across US, Canada, Czech Republic, and Hong Kong. 7,000+ e-commerce merchant customers. Shopify Plus certified partner. Competes with ShipBob, Whiplash, and Deliverr (Shopify) for e-commerce 3PL.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-order and per-unit storage fees; receiving fees
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-order fulfillment fee, per-unit storage, pick and pack, receiving; carrier rates passed through; volume discounts for high-volume merchants
pricing.notes: Dania Beach FL. Private ($290M raised). Founded 2014. 7,000+ e-commerce merchants. 10+ fulfillment centers US/Canada/EU/HK. Per-order usage pricing with storage fees.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order submission and inventory queries throttled; webhooks for order status and tracking events

known_agent_gotchas: INVENTORY LEVEL LAG VS REAL-TIME WAREHOUSE STATE: ShipMonk API inventory levels reflect system-of-record, not real-time physical count; automated reorder triggers on API inventory data during active receiving or cycle count windows may reflect inaccurate levels; implement inventory freeze window during warehouse operations before automated reorder decisions

HAZMAT RESTRICTED ITEM CARRIER ROUTING: Automated carrier selection must apply hazmat product attributes (UN number, packing group) to carrier eligibility filter; ShipMonk supports hazmat fulfillment for eligible carriers only; automated hazmat order routing to non-certified carrier creates carrier rejection and merchant compliance violation

MULTI-WAREHOUSE ALLOCATION ORDER ROUTING: Automated order routing for merchants with inventory across multiple ShipMonk warehouses must optimize for shipping zone, inventory availability, and carrier transit time; naive warehouse selection creates suboptimal shipping costs and transit time SLA failures

Return merchandise authorization (RMA) approval before processing — automated return processing in ShipMonk requires RMA creation before physical return arrival; automated return disposition (restock, quarantine, destroy) instructions must be pre-configured in RMA; physical returns without RMA are quarantined and require manual disposition

Shopify fulfillment order sync — ShipMonk Shopify integration uses Shopify's fulfillment order API; automated order injection via ShipMonk API bypasses Shopify fulfillment order sync; implement Shopify fulfillment order confirmation alongside ShipMonk order creation for consistent Shopify order status

International customs documentation for cross-border fulfillment — automated international order fulfillment from ShipMonk non-US warehouses (Czech Republic, Hong Kong) requires customs documentation (commercial invoice, HS codes); automated international shipment without complete customs data creates customs clearance delay and carrier rejection
agent_readiness.security_notes: 3PL fulfillment. SOC2. API key. US/EU/CA. Order, inventory, and shipping data.

security_score_components.security_notes: E-commerce 3PL. SOC2. API key. US/EU/CA. Order, inventory, and merchant account data.
